messages.content: {"type": "crypto", "analysis": "", "structured": {"display_type": "crypto", "market_overview": "Crypto market is in FEAR (38.5 F&G) with mild short bias (avg funding -0.0077%). Fear 38.5 = opportunity to deploy capital selectively, not hoard it.", "hedge_considerations": "If portfolio >50% crypto, consider: 1) BTC put spread $63K/$60K (protects against 10% drop). 2) Small PAXG position (5%) as safe haven. 3) Tight stops on squeeze plays \u2014 OM stop $0.055, SNX stop $1.75."}, "disclaimer": "Not financial advice \u2014 do your own research and manage your risk."}}
